profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Batavia Prosperindo Trans Tbk provides transportation services in Indonesia. It offers long-term and short-term rental, and fleet management services. The company also engages in transportation consultation business, as well as operates web portal and digital platform, and car repair services. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Batavia Prosperindo Trans Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk.
